candidate_definitions.text: Protein language model trained on coding DNA

This repository encapsulates all code required to reproduce the results of the paper ["Codon language embeddings provide strong signals for use in protein engineering"](https://www.nature.com/articles/s42256-024-00791-0), by Carlos Outeiral and Charlotte M. Deane.
A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.

> **🔔 Claude Scientific Skills is now Scientific Agent Skills.** Same skills, broader compatibility — now works with any AI agent that supports the open [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io/) standard, not just Claude.
